With Fiddleford having gone back to Tennessee for the holidays, only you and Stanford were left in the dorm to 'hold down the fort' until winter break was over, so to speak. With how much time you've spent in Stanford and Fiddleford's dorm room, it really wasn't until the holidays started that you kept noticing how Stanford likes to wear those goddamn green booty shorts of his.

The way it hugs the swell of his ass and crotch. The way it makes his fucking thighs look even more delectable than usual... You don't know how long your patience will last, and with the way Stanford kept sneaking glances at you whenever he thought you weren't looking, the little tease is aware of this.

This is why you have him pinned down on his bed while he's 'studying', face buried between his cheeks, and eating him out like you've been starving for years.
